subject: Frontiers: Registration Confirmation
body:
Dear jeffrey edward,

You recently registered with Frontiers.

If you did not register while prompted by clicking the 'Accept' link on an invitation, your Frontiers account will only be activated when you click the link below:

http://www.frontiersin.org/Registration/Register.aspx?ActivationNumber=18473bf1-833d-462c-bfcb-f2986fc518f2

If clicking on the link doesn't work, try copying and pasting it into your browser. 

With best regards, 

Frontiers Registration Office
registration.office@frontiersin.org
www.frontiersin.org

http://www.frontiersin.org/Mail/IbarMail.aspx?op=4&msgid=6635211&msg=In
